string.text:
A backpack designed by local stalker craftsmen, this backpack is a considerable improvement over other available backpacks - it contains some tools from Hunter's Kit popular among hunters. Naturally, this makes it heavier than other backpacks, but it offers greater carrying capacity.
 
 %c[ui_gray_1]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] tailored to the Zone's conditions
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] everyday item
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] item storage
 %c[0,100,255,150] • %c[ui_gray_2] usable as stash
 %c[d_orange] • %c[ui_gray_2] possession increases number of body parts obtained from mutants

A very simple, but effective backpack, generally preferred to the only other cheap, widespread backpack in the Zone. It offers decent carrying capacity and is a very decent option for any rookies who have to lug around huge amounts of loot. Very popular among diggers in the Garbage and small faction groups. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_1]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] tailored to the Zone's conditions
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] everyday item
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] item storage
 %c[0,100,255,150] • %c[ui_gray_2] usable as stash

An imported and Zone-upgraded backpack. This hiking backpack contains many extra pouches for storing more items as well as chest straps and padded straps for maximum comfort and weight distribution. These backpacks are hard to find in The Zone. Like the stalker backpack, it has been tailored to The Zone's conditions and comes with a number of tools from the Hunter's kit.
 
 %c[ui_gray_1]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] tailored to the Zone's conditions
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] everyday item
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] item storage
 %c[0,100,255,150] • %c[ui_gray_2] usable as stash
 %c[d_orange] • %c[ui_gray_2] possession increases number of body parts obtained from mutants

A tactical backpack, retailored to Duty's needs out in the field. This backpack contains various tools for extracting mutant parts more effectively, all while offering very competitive carrying capacity. Despite the various chest straps, it is not very comfortable. Used by Duty forces.
 
 %c[ui_gray_1]PROPERTIES:
 %c[0,100,255,150] • %c[ui_gray_2] used by "Duty" forces
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] tailored to the Zone's conditions
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] everyday item
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] item storage
 %c[0,100,255,150] • %c[ui_gray_2] usable as stash
 %c[d_orange] • %c[ui_gray_2] possession increases number of body parts obtained from mutants

A tactical backpack, retailored to Freedom's needs out in the field. This backpack was made to be as light and as comfortable as possible while offering the best carrying capacity. Used by Freedom forces.
 
 %c[ui_gray_1]PROPERTIES:
 %c[0,100,255,150] • %c[ui_gray_2] used by "Freedom" forces
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] tailored to the Zone's conditions
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] everyday item
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] item storage
 %c[0,100,255,150] • %c[ui_gray_2] usable as stash\
